sponsor_2.pragraph: The sponsors who give their valuable amount to fulfill our mission.

posts.title: Donating blood connects us all in a soul.
posts.name: Deborah Beck
posts.pragraph: The campaign aims to highlight stories of people whose lives have been saved through blood donation, to motivate regular blood donors to continue giving blood, and motivate people in good health who have never given blood to begin doing so, particularly young people
